svg.text: 12 layers · 4 LLM roles · doom-loop recovery · pixel grounding · QEMU-in-Docker sandbox with X11 controller
L2 · AGENT ORCHESTRATION · Agent.java main loop
1. capture screenshot · 2. plan · 3. ground · 4. dispatch action
5. settle (600 ms) · 6. post-screenshot · 7. verify · 8. update plan
9. supervisor every N or on doom-loop signal
L3 · DECISION LLMs · same model, 4 roles, different prompts
→ fires supervisor in angry bird mode (vision on)
same non-nav routeHash ≥ 2× in last 5 turns
supervisor EXECUTE only fires sanctioned actions
no hint injection back to planner (text was ignored in v1)
simple-coords prompt = best per-step (2.1 s, ~5 px)
~3 s end-to-end · used only when first grounding fails
no dy/dx sign-inference fallback (v1 bug class)
goal: "LLM outside the loop, sandbox runs the loop"
KVM=N falls back to QEMU TCG (slow)
firewall locked to operator IP (SOURCE_IP CIDR)
Alt: self-hosted vLLM (Qwen3-VL on Hetzner CPU)
replaced $400/day Gemini direct with $0/day Hetzner CPU
cloud-agnostic — bring your own GPU host
A · Hetzner CCX33 — dedicated AMD, bare metal, €0.083/hr
B · GCP n2-standard-8 spot — nested KVM, ~$0.10/hr
C · Local Mac (Apple Silicon) — TCG fallback, slow boot
D · Local Linux x86 with /dev/kvm — fastest local
all options pull the same happysixd/osworld-docker image
QEMU-in-Docker harness — same image, same look as OSWorld
Ubuntu.qcow2 (~10 GB) from xlangai/ubuntu_osworld on Hugging Face
Failure dumps — JSONL on first ok=false / unhandled error
Token telemetry — per-call usage piped to Web UI live
runtime gotchas: async handler, GenerationResult, mlx-vlm ≥0.4.4
36 GB RAM ceiling on dev box
+ UI-TARS-1.5 Q8 (port 9090) on the same box
~4 s warm vision call · do NOT run both encoders concurrently
drop-in for Gemini brain when budget matters
HTN runtime validated end-to-end on this stack (2026-05-08)
uitars-grounding skill — full deploy script + 5 reference docs
Firewall: SOURCE_IP CIDR (default open in dev, lock in prod)
No costSafeModel name swap (was a silent downgrade trap)
No hint injection back to planner (only supervisor changes plan)
